hero.subtitle: Payxem gives freelancers, consultants, and small businesses a simple way to invoice clients and collect payments without the complexity of traditional platforms or expensive monthly fees.
hero.note: No signup fees. No monthly charges. Start invoicing in under 60 seconds.

items.question: Is Payxem free to use?
items.answer: Yes. There are no monthly fees or setup costs. You only pay a small platform fee (2.9% + $0.30) when you receive a payment. Payment processors (PayPal, Stripe) apply their own fees based on their policy. Your client can also choose to cover the processing fee at checkout.

items.question: What payment methods do my clients have?
items.answer: Your clients can pay by PayPal, Stripe Link, credit or debit card, or cryptocurrency (USDT, BTC, ETH, and others). They choose their preferred method on the payment page.

items.question: How do I withdraw my money?
items.answer: Withdrawals are free from Payxem — we do not charge any fee on withdrawals. You can withdraw to a bank account (via IBAN), a crypto wallet (supporting multiple blockchains), or through Wise for international transfers. Standard currency exchange or bank transfer fees may apply by partner or processing banks.

items.question: Is Payxem available in my country?
items.answer: Payxem is built to work globally, with a focus on regions where major payment services are limited or unavailable, such as Pakistan, Bangladesh, and similar markets. If you have internet access, you can use Payxem.

items.question: How long does it take to get paid?
items.answer: Funds are released within 7 business/working days after security clearance. Business days exclude weekends and public holidays. Withdrawal times depend on your chosen method but typically take 1-3 business days after funds are available.

items.question: Do I need to verify my identity?
items.answer: Basic features are available immediately. Identity verification (KYC) is required to unlock payouts and higher limits. The process is quick and handled through a trusted verification partner.

items.question: Can I use Payxem on my phone?
items.answer: Yes. Payxem is a progressive web app (PWA) that works on any device. You can install it on your phone for a native app-like experience without downloading from an app store.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Paid?
cta.description: Create your free account, send your first invoice, and start collecting payments today.
cta.note: No credit card required. Start in under 60 seconds.
